channel.title: OpenTwins Blog
channel.description: Guides on AI-powered social media automation, LinkedIn growth, building in public and safe engagement strategies.

item.title: Case Study: 0 to 1000 LinkedIn Connections in 30 Days
item.description: How a tech leader used OpenTwins to grow from 0 to 1,047 LinkedIn connections in 30 days. Week-by-week breakdown with config settings and real metrics.

item.title: Ethical AI Twin: Authenticity in Automated Engagement
item.description: How OpenTwins maintains authenticity in AI-powered social media engagement through voice calibration, rate limits and ethical design. The anti-spam approach.

item.title: Grow Your LinkedIn Presence with AI Agents
item.description: A step-by-step framework for using AI agents to build genuine LinkedIn authority. Covers engagement patterns, rate limits and measuring ROI.

item.title: Build in Public Without the Time Cost
item.description: How founders can share their journey across multiple platforms without spending hours each day. Automation strategies that keep authenticity intact.

item.title: AI Social Media Engagement: A Practical Guide
item.description: Everything you need to know about using AI for social media engagement in 2026. Choosing tools, measuring results and avoiding common pitfalls.

item.title: How OpenTwins Works: Architecture Deep Dive
item.description: Technical walkthrough of OpenTwins internals: the agent loop, browser automation, Claude integration, content strategy engine and real-time dashboard.

item.title: Social Media Automation Without Getting Banned
item.description: How to automate your social media presence safely. Understand what triggers platform detection and what doesn't, with practical limits for each platform.
